allow: Bash(chmod +x /opt/ollama/deploy_ollama.sh /opt/ollama/start_gateway.sh)
Bash(cd /opt/ollama/gateway && pip install -r requirements.txt -q)
Bash(python -c "from main import app; print\('导入成功'\)")
Bash(pip3 install -r requirements.txt -q)
Bash(python3 -c "from main import app; print\('导入成功'\)")
Bash(pip3 install -r requirements.txt)
Bash(which python3.10 && python3.10 --version)
Bash(/usr/local/python3.10/bin/python3.10 -c "from main import app; print\('导入成功'\)")
Bash(ollama list 2>/dev/null || echo "Ollama 未安装或未运行")
Bash(sleep 2 && curl -s http://localhost:8000/docs -o /dev/null && echo "网关服务已启动" || echo "网关服务启动失败")
Bash(cd /opt/ollama && git config user.email "user@example.com" && git config user.name "User")
Bash(git remote add origin git@github.com:pangpang20/ollama_local_gateway.git)
Bash(git add -A && git status)

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Initial commit: Ollama local API gateway

Features:
- Local deployment of Qwen3 models via Ollama
- API format conversion for embedding and chat endpoints
- SSE streaming support for chat completions
- API Key verification via szc-api-key header
- OpenAPI/Swagger documentation

Components:
- deploy_ollama.sh: Ollama installation script
- start_gateway.sh: Gateway startup script
- gateway/: FastAPI application
  - main.py: Main entry point with routes
  - config.py: Environment configuration
  - clients/ollama_client.py: Async Ollama API client
  - schemas/: Pydantic data models

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
Bash(git push -u origin master)
Bash(git branch -m master main && git push -u origin main)
Bash(git fetch origin main && git merge origin/main --allow-unrelated-histories || true)
Bash(git checkout --ours README.md .gitignore && git add README.md .gitignore)
Bash(git commit -m "Resolve merge conflict: keep local version")
Bash(git push -u origin main)

Bash(curl -X POST http://localhost:8000/gateway/ti/qwen3-coder-30b/v1/chat/completions \\
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \\
  -H "szc-api-key: i3aVEZ3KkzHwzmTYu8sVhykf" \\
  -d '{
    "model": "Qwen3-Coder-4B",
    "messages": [{"role": "user", "content": "你好"}],
    "stream": true
  }' 2>&1)
Bash(curl http://localhost:11434/api/tags 2>&1)

Bash(ollama list)
Bash(git add gateway/clients/ollama_client.py gateway/main.py)

Bash(git commit -m "fix\(gateway\): 修复 Ollama API 兼容性问题

- 将 API 端点从 /api/chat 改为 /api/generate，适配 Ollama 0.17.6 版本
- 支持 Qwen3 模型的 thinking 字段输出
- 修复非流式响应中异步生成器调用错误
- 支持使用请求中的 model 参数而非固定配置
- 增加超时时间至 5 分钟，给模型加载留足时间")
Bash(git push)

Bash(git add gateway/main.py && git commit -m "feat\(gateway\): 添加 keep_alive 选项让模型永久驻留内存

- 在 chat/completions 接口中添加 keep_alive: -1 选项
- 模型将永久驻留内存，直到手动卸载或重启 Ollama
- 提升连续请求的响应速度")

Bash(git add start_gateway.sh && git commit -m "feat\(startup\): 增加 Ollama 后台启动检查

- 在网关启动前检查 ollama serve 是否已在后台运行
- 如未运行则使用 nohup 后台启动
- 避免 Ollama 重复启动")
Bash(tar --use-compress-program=zstd -tf ollama-linux-amd64.tar.zst | head -20)

Bash(git add deploy_ollama.sh && git commit -m "fix\(deploy\): 修复离线安装包解压路径问题

- 安装包内文件路径为 bin/ollama 而非 ollama
- 先解压到临时目录，再复制文件到正确位置
- 添加库文件路径到 LD_LIBRARY_PATH" && git push)
Bash(chmod +x /opt/ollama/deploy_ollama_docker.sh)
